commands_run: python3 -m http.server <port> --bind 0.0.0.0; adb shell "ip route; toybox nc ..."
failure_reason: Direct wifi-tcp carrier is instrumented but not proven. One run saw Mac en0 and Android wlan0 both report IPv4 192.168.0.7, so Android connected to itself and refused the receipt socket; after Android moved to 192.168.0.4, the bounded direct TCP client timed out against Mac 192.168.0.7; the IPv6 link-local probe to the Mac address timed out too. Existing adb-forward-tcp carrier proof still passed with 2048 width-8 samples and remote cleanup.
